title: Refactor data layer for streaming
body:
## Summary

Replaces the blocking `fetch_all` path with a streaming iterator so large repositories
don't pin a full result set in memory.

- Introduces `RepositoryStream` with backpressure
- Cuts peak memory by ~60% on the 50k-row benchmark
- Keeps the `fetch_all` shim for two releases for compatibility

## Test plan

- [x] Existing unit tests pass
- [x] New stream cancellation tests
- [ ] Manual smoke test on the staging mirror
